transcript: Speaker A: Oi gawar chakri kibhabe peyesis tui? Er to bhalo kore English-o ashe na. [Hey rustic, how did you get this job? He doesn't even know English properly.] Speaker B: Abhinav, office-e prothom din kemon chhilo? [Abhinav, how was your first day at the office?] Speaker C: Haan, thik chhilo. [Yes, it was fine.] Speaker B: Shob thik nei mone hochche. [Doesn't seem like everything is fine.] Speaker C: Boss shobar shamne amake boka diyeche karon amar English ashe na. [Boss scolded me in front of everyone because I don't know English.] Speaker B: Tui MySivi keno try korchish na? 1 rupee diyei shuru korte parbi. [Why don't you try MySivi? You can start with just 1 rupee.] Speaker D: Hi, apni English shikhte eshechen? [Hi, have you come to learn English?] Speaker C: I am learn English. Speaker D: Na na, ebhabe bolun: I am learning English. [No, say it like this: I am learning English.] Speaker E: Great job at achieving sales target. [Great job at achieving sales target.]
on_screen_text: Oi gawar chakri kibhabe peyesis tui... [Hey rustic, how did you get this job...] 1 rupee diyei shuru korte parbi [You can start with just 1 rupee] তুমিও করতে পারো, বিশ্বাস করো! Mysivi app try করো শুধু 1 rupee থেকে শুরু [You can do it too, believe me! Try Mysivi app starting from just 1 rupee] Everyone's beginning is not the same.
summary: An animated skit shows a young professional struggling and being mocked at work due to poor English. After a recommendation from a close one, he uses the MySivi app for just 1 rupee to practice speaking. He successfully improves his communication skills and earns appreciation from his boss.
